#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Test JellyTV Backend API - Authentication, Owner, and Public endpoints"

backend:
  - task: "Authentication - Login endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ Login endpoint working perfectly - successfully logged in as ryan (owner) with credentials ryan/115457. JWT token properly set in cookies."

  - task: "Authentication - Session info endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/auth/me working correctly - retrieved session for authenticated user ryan with proper role and user data."

  - task: "Authentication - Logout endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ POST /api/auth/logout working correctly - successfully logged out and cleared session cookies."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - List users"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/owner/users working correctly - retrieved user list (initially 0 users). Proper authentication check implemented for owner role."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - Create user"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ POST /api/owner/users working correctly - successfully created new user with username, password, and subscriptionEnd. Password properly hashed with bcrypt."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - List categories"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/owner/categories working correctly - retrieved 5 default categories (Movies, Series, Sports, Kids, News)."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - Create category"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ POST /api/owner/categories working correctly - successfully created new category with name and description. Auto-generates slug from name."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - TMDB search"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/owner/tmdb/search working correctly - successfully searched for 'Inception' and returned 11 results. TMDB API integration working with API key."

  - task: "Owner Endpoints - Add media link"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ POST /api/owner/media/add-link working correctly - successfully added new media item with title, URL, type, and categoryId."

  - task: "Public Endpoints - Get categories"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/categories (public) working correctly - retrieved 6 categories with counts. No authentication required."

  - task: "Public Endpoints - Get media"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/media (public) working correctly - retrieved 1 media item with metadata and category relations. No authentication required."

  - task: "Public Endpoints - Get channels"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "app/api/[[...path]]/route.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ GET /api/channels (public) working correctly - retrieved 0 channels (none created yet). No authentication required."

  - task: "Database Setup and Seeding"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "prisma/seed.js"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ Database properly seeded - owner account (ryan/115457) exists and all 5 default categories created (Movies, Series, Sports, Kids, News)."

frontend:
  - task: "Frontend UI Components"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "components/ui/table.jsx"
    stuck_count: 1
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: false
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "❌ Initial issue: Missing @radix-ui/react-table dependency causing 500 errors on all routes."
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ FIXED: Removed unused @radix-ui/react-table import from table component. Component only uses basic HTML table elements, not Radix primitives."

metadata:
  created_by: "testing_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "All backend API endpoints tested"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "🎉 COMPLETE SUCCESS: All 13 backend API tests passed (100% success rate). Fixed critical UI component issue that was blocking API access. JellyTV backend is fully functional with proper authentication, owner management features, TMDB integration, and public data access. Database properly seeded with owner account and default categories."
